programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Tamara is tasked with updating a 1984 ranch house. She installs a herringbone walkway and adds a beautiful study space plus she upgrades the kids' bathroom. S3 E11.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End
programme.desc: Lucas transforms a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious pool space worthy of a 5-star resort. S2 E8.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a small home near the ocean that could sell for a huge profit. S6 E13.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Khloe tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall, but her meddling ends up making matters worse.

programme.title: Lego Masters: Australia Vs The World
programme.desc: LEGO Masters teams are challenged with creating iconic vehicles for some of Batman's greatest foes to earn a spot into the Semi Finals.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An outdoorsy couple is looking for a Palm Island, FL, home that has dock access but is also quiet. S17 E7.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After only three months of dating, a New York woman puts it all on the line for love and moves to Redcliffe, Australia. S171 E13.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After 20 years away, a California man brings his family back to Auckland, hoping to stay for good - but they'll need a spacious home close to the kids' school to win everyone over.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards console a mother suffering heatstroke who has lost her 3-year-old child. Later, Tommy and Harrison treat hundreds of people suffering stings. S12 E7.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Tony Lyall, Dai Henwood, Bailey Poching, Ben Hurley, Justine Smith, Angella Dravid.

programme.title: The Inspired Unemployed (Impractical) Jo
programme.desc: The Aussie Jokers take over a suburban supermarket causing chaos at the checkout. They also try to master the art of small talk at a speed dating event.

programme.title: Crackhead
programme.desc: Frankie teeters on the edge of a dangerous relapse after a serious incident rocks the clinic to its core.

programme.title: Double Parked
programme.desc: Lily jumps to the worst-case scenarios when Johnny doesn't return home after Nat and Steph's meltdown at the hospital. Nat tries to see Johnny, but he's being protected by Rosie.

programme.title: Homebound 3.0
programme.desc: Melissa questions her future with Henry after a bad dream, leading to revelations and surprises at their housewarming-turned-baby-shower.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of London
programme.desc: Chelsea may be in bloom, but old wounds are in season as gossip, grudges, and group chaos take over.

programme.title: Daddy Issues
programme.desc: Gemma seeks advice from her aunt Jess, and Malcolm is scared of her bully husband Tyrone.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers host their first-ever Couples Secret Santa with homemade gifts and more! S8 E12.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys help a struggling Idaho family in a cliffside geodesic dome home. Misty builds an innovative garden greenhouse, while Matt finds a dangerous predator.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials.

programme.title: Easter Basket Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining bakers take on the ultimate final challenge: a 4-foot-tall edible Easter basket filled with over-the-top desserts and the ultimate Easter cake.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions
programme.desc: Tamara brings a 1960s Colonial to life by making sure light pours into all of her updated spaces. S3 E12.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End
programme.desc: Lucas creates an oasis for both humans and birds for a family living in a designated bird sanctuary. S2 E9.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a good deal on a dirty home in El Monte, California. S6 E14.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kardashians
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend.

programme.title: Lego Masters: Australia Vs The World
programme.desc: The final four teams battle it out in the Semi Finals as they bring to life their own floating 'Lily Pad', featuring a specific colour palette, to earn a place in the Grand Final.

programme.title: Beach Hunters
programme.desc: A family is on the hunt for the perfect beachfront property on Camino Island. S5 E3.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An active couple is searching for private outdoor space and beach access in Melbourne Beach, FL. S17 E8.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A South African couple is excited for a taste of European life in Amsterdam. S172 E1.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An Ohio family is looking to leave the cold behind and move to Australia's Bellarine Peninsula. They seek an affordable, spacious home on the beach.

programme.title: Threenews
programme.desc: ThreeNews presents comprehensive coverage of global and local news.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter And The Order Of The
programme.desc: Harry and Dumbledore warn of Voldemort's return, but the Ministry denies it and seeks to discredit them at Hogwarts. Stars Daniel Radcliffe.

programme.title: 7 Days
programme.desc: NZ's longest running comedy show is back for its 18th season of absolute hilarity. Hosted by Jeremy Corbett. Guests: Tony Lyall, Dai Henwood, Bailey Poching, Ben Hurley, Justine Smith, Angella Dravid.

programme.title: Killer Grannies
programme.desc: A kind-hearted granny is hailed as a saint for running a boarding house-until a missing client sparks an investigation and her beautiful garden reveals horrific secrets.

programme.title: 9-1-1: Lone Star
programme.desc: Owen wears an FBI wire for his meeting with O'Brien, the Honor Dogs crash the meet-up and let them know there's an infiltrator In their midst; a frantic TK desperately searches for a missing Carlos.
